free_text: Experimental study of the rearrangements of valence
protons and neutrons amongst single-particle orbits
during double-beta decay in 100Mo
MP tandem accelerator at the
Maier-Leibnitz Laboratorium of the Ludwig-Maximilians
Universitat and the Technische Universitat Munchen
Q3D magnetic spectrometer
Statistical uncertainties
Systematic uncertainties - 5%.
VS
SD: Small correction in Subent 013.
SD: Corrections in Subents 004, 013.
Isotopically enriched target with nominal thicknesses
of 100 ug/cm2, which were evaporated onto thin carbon
foils with thicknesses in the range of 8-20 ug/cm2.
